title: TBD Map Locations
description: Named settlements, peaks, and cartographic labels for a terrain (T-152.6). Coordinates: x east, y north, world meters (same frame as manifest worldBounds).

name.description: Human display label for cartographic text (T-152.8). Reject 'Location composition' at export (G6).

y.description: North meters (Reforger world Z → export Y).

importance.description: A3-style label importance for declutter (0 = minor, 1 = capital).

kind.description: Optional taxonomy for render/filter (defaults to town when omitted). Town lane draws town/village/airport, plus locality at z≥0 (T-152.17).
